counters.description: if you want to win this mad clown, you should communicate with your team all the time since he can make his team lead to crazy snowball potential later with his boxes and his annoying clone. his q can make you suffer like living in the hell since it makes him blink and outplay for him every single time. prepare for his coming at all cost. after 30 min, he can't do his trick easily since everyone in your team should have oracle lens and control ward to deny his gank in late game.

freaking tree will make you headache, if you can't counter him quickly. he has everything that normal supports have but play as jungler. if his team knows how to play around him, it will be annoying entire game. buy shadowflame or item that can kill quickly as you see him.
avoid him at early game,you can't win over him with his tankiness and a lot of cc. buy rylai to slow him down and play burn hp set to melt his hp down to the ground.

he taunts you,aa to you and you die over and over again. his cc is so terrified to your teammates, and he is so tanky. prepare his coming and avoid his cc at all cost or else buy something like banshee or zhonyas to protect yourself. and you need only liandry to melt his hp down.

he's not dangerous to you but your teammates. he presses his all-in r and your team get rooted and get killed. banshee is a must to deny his cc. if you can kill him early game, you will be outscaled him easily. try to delay your game up until your teammates have cleansing item or defensive item.

don't fight him at early-mid game alone because his sustain and tanky. after buy morellonomicon to anti-heal in mid game, focus where he is, and take down his entire team with your team, this'll make him unplayable.

in the early game, he's so powerful and can make you die without another chance to deal with. just don't fight him, peel with your e+q in the mid-late game, he can't even fight you anymore because of insane damage and stun from your e
if he uses his ult, there's nothing you can do about it since it'll make your map near sighting. try to regroup with your team and don't go alone.
you can't fight him alone since he has r to dodge your cc.
extremely high damage and cc. don't fight him and use your combo in bush rather than fight by eyes to eyes.

depending on how much on your skill level. her passive in level 6 is quite annoying since it makes her camouflage anytime. her skill and r can execute low hp so fast. the only way to counter her is buy control ward to reveal camouflage . she can't do her trick if control ward is still there. so you should buy it too or communicate with your team to buy for your team. otherwise, you can use oracle lens to predict her move instead.
after reworked, freaking hard counter to taliyah. his r suppressed you and he can dive his e into a wall. don't fight him at all cost. call your teammate to help you.

her e dash is quite fast , difficult to react but you can cast e to counter her if you can. try to use aoe q and worked ground q to harass in lane and find a way to gank the other lane. buy zhonya's to deny her r. she'll be hard time to play after 30 min since your team should have defensive item to counter her already.
watch out her stack and play around it.
she can counter you in every way.
his e is so annoying to deal with and his r can make you die in one combo.
depending on how much on your skill level.
her cc is so much to deal with, making her looks so annoying.
his passive and his skill will always counter you in every way.
his skill is quite a lot of damage as he looks. even if you try to cast e on him, he can just press r and leaves you.
farm and kite her before level 6
rarely see in mid lane but his damage is so crazy too.
his yellow card can stun lock you, you should be careful when you want to kite to him or kill him.
his skill is quite in pain to you
a good anivia players is so dangerous.

the new patch is tristana favor. you can't fight her in early game at all costs with her early power potential, even waveclear is better than you. wait until level 9 and gank the other lane. she'll be fall back after your team get every item to counter her later.

he'll always outcast you outside of your range and all of his skill doesn't need to be close to you to do a ton of damage to you. rush boots to increase a chance to dodge his skill. don't fight him until he uses his stun ball.
early game, you can't win over her because she cast her shield and press rq to pressure you under tower easily. you need to farm and find an opportunity to gank the other lane.

synergies.description: a lot of stun and being tank. mostly free kill and win teamfights. same as a mid-lane
root+hook and his r guarantee knocked up, being tank = super good mostly free kill same as a mid-lane
stun cc+tank. guarantee win teamfight
stun + his r knock up = free kill guarantee win teamfight
janna is quite balanced kits. she has shield, knocked up cc and slow for your team. great support
great set up and hard cc she have. just like other a tank support.

good bard will make his r actually useful and game changing or else completely useless. his q can stun two person and can heal with his health shrine. his gate can allow you to roam easily in the map and completely destroy the other lane. but you need actually good bard first, not a troll.
his w can combo with your e perfectly if he knows how your e actually does. good combo
she can transform them into animal and have a knock up in her ult. she has a set skill allow you to play aggressive.
you play as a jungler, you need to force some gank first before she can use her ult because all of her skill is quite slow and predicable.
she's okay as mid-lane but as a support, not that easily. her root can be predictable easily and she's so squishy. you need to be in frontline and set up gank for her and adc to follow-up easily.
only be in ideal if your blitzcrank can hook enemy up every time.

this is totally different as a jungler. you need a support that can set up teamfights and cc for you to gank. soraka can't do that, instead you need to set up all of these things by yourself which quite difficult if you don't actually used to with her.
like soraka but worst. she can't help you at all if you don't get attached by her.
just like a mid-laner. if you can set up cc for her, she can carry you entire game. best combo
if you can set up your w+e for him correctly, he can win in lane, and carry entire game.
like yasuo but better with his r since he can make cc easier than yasuo
a lot of knock up cc + being tank. guarantee win teamfight
her r stun someone and free kill.  but you play as a jungler, you need a reliable cc that can hit easily. if she uses her arrow and can't hit anyone, your gank will be useless instantly.

super giga late game champion. you can only gank his lane to help him when he has level 6 and his enemy has a low hp. his cc is wide and reliable. his damage will be high after he has lots of stack, so you don't need worry about late game as much......if only he don't int and feed before you can help him.
high damage and mobility. he can follow-up with you easily with his shadow blink and his target lock ult.

her skill can combo with you like casting the wall and she use her ult to push into your wall and get stunned. her damage is stable and carry with you if you can duo with someone that can play qiyana very well.

high damage and fast finish-off skill. his e (assassin's path) allow him to roam and help you to gank and invade other jungler. since both of you have a roaming potential, use this advantage to make their lane miserable.
all mid-lane mage champion those can follow-up with you like ahri, annie, malzahar, etc...... always good with taliyah when she set up gank for them.
all top lane champions those can follow-up with her like aatrox, jax, fiora, darius with ghost, etc.... always good with taliyah after she set up gank for them
a lot of stun and being tank. mostly free kill and win teamfights.
root+hook and his r guarantee knocked up, being tank = super good mostly free kill same as a mid-lane
stun cc+tank. guarantee win teamfight
stun + his r knock up = free kill guarantee win teamfight

if she know how your skill actually is, she can use her e push someone to your e instead.
heals a lot ,making you unkillable.
he can root them for you and kill them easily.

if you meet a good lee sin players, they may use his r to your e.
her r is so good for your team and make your combo even stronger.
since new patch,yuumi has an only slow, shield and healing. so, she can't help to catch up enemies anymore.

if you meet very good bard players, his r can make your combo becomes godlike since their team's got stasis from his r and wait for using your combo
his w can combo with your e perfectly if he knows how your e actually does.
if your blitzcrank can hook your enemy up every time, this can be ideal to you.

the best of aoe knocked up cc. if she can knock all enemy up with your combo, they're dead. good combo
she has only her e to make root cc for you, can't reliable
he can't make cc for you, worst, you need to make cc for him instead. but his damage is good.
he's adc that can make aoe cc with his r.
quite a niche gank but she need to farm for her stack.
his farming is so slow, and he can't help in early game. but after mid-game, you can use your combo, allow him to backstab enemy easily.

early game is excellent but fall off in late game. he can make your team extremely lead with his blink and clone, especially with ignite. but, you need to end game quickly before he will fall off in late game because their team will have defensive item to deny his gank.
just like shaco but with extremely massive ap damage. he can copy their ultimate and some ult can be game changing.
every early game jungler champion like elise can make your game win easily but always fall off late game. you need to use this advantage to end your game quickly.
